name: AI Research Chat — Ask a Question, Get an Answer
description: Ask any question, search the web for relevant sources via Exa, have Claude AI analyze the findings, and post a well-sourced answer to Slack. A simple question-answering pipeline.

source.originalName: Chat with local LLMs using n8n and Ollama

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Search the web for relevant sources
Compile search results into source material
